name: Simply Chowder Soup for a Crowd
recipeIngredient: 7 (10 oz.) cans cream of potato soup
12 ounces canned shrimp, small cocktail size
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the chopped onion in butter until soft.
2. Add the thawed fish fillets and cook until the fish is flaky.
3. Stir in the soup, milk, clam juice, and shrimp.
4. Simmer until heated through.
5. Serve hot. This can be frozen for later use.
